Traditional_Chinese: 這個是整個瑪德利賈美食家的最愛，這道美味的佳餚可以完全恢復生命。

Traditional_Chinese: 一種奇特的藍色藥水，飲用後可在限定時間內賦予無限魔力，持續 1 小時。

English: A very strong energy drink that completely refills the imbiber's FP while granting unlimited FP for a limited time. Lasts 1 hour.
Traditional_Chinese: 一種非常強的能量飲料，可完全恢復飲用者的活力，並可在限定時間內賦予無限活力，持續 1 小時。

English: Resets your stats. Only applies to your current stat page.
Traditional_Chinese: 重置你的角色數值，僅適用於你當前的數值頁面。

Traditional_Chinese: 將大喊的範圍擴大到整個瑪德利賈，使用之後將持續 15 天 (需要等級：20)

Traditional_Chinese: 內行人稱其為「紅色卷軸」，這個強大的劇團道具強化了劇團技能，消除劇團技能的限制範圍，效果持續 15 天。

Prevents the loss of Exp through death. (Prevents the loss of 10% Exp for users with Karma)
Traditional_Chinese: 使用後馬上變為祝福狀態，祝福狀態時死亡不會失去經驗值，祝福狀態可以維持到角色死亡。(紅人狀態下死亡，將會保留原本死亡後所喪失經驗值之 10%)

Traditional_Chinese: 角色死亡時身上有此物品可原地立即復活並且不會失去經驗值。(紅人狀態下死亡，將會保留原本死亡後所喪失經驗值之 10%)

English: This scroll prevents the loss of equipment in the event of upgrade or elemental attribute upgrade failure. To use, place scroll in the appropriate box on the Upgrade Menu before attempting the upgrade. The scroll is consumed in the process.
Traditional_Chinese: 精煉前需先使用卷軸，精煉或附加元素失敗時物品不會消失，無法增加精煉成功機率，一張卷軸適用一次精煉 (不論成功或失敗)。

English: Decreases attribute instead of destroying the equipment while upgrading. To use, place scroll in the appropriate box on the Upgrade Menu before attempting the upgrade. The scroll is consumed in the process.
Traditional_Chinese: 升級時不會破壞裝備，而是降低屬性。使用時，請在嘗試升級前將卷軸放入升級選單中的對應欄位。卷軸會在過程中被消耗。

English: This scroll protects armor suits from breaking when a piercing fails. To use, place scroll in the appropriate box on the Piercing Menu before attempting the piercing. The scroll is consumed during the piercing process.
Traditional_Chinese: 精煉前需先使用卷軸，穿洞精煉失敗時，物品不會消失。使用時請在打動之前將卷軸放在穿洞選單上相對應框中。卷軸在穿洞過程中會被消耗。

English: This scroll prevents the loss of an accessory when an upgrade fails. To use, place scroll in the appropriate box on the Accessory Upgrade Menu before attempting the upgrade. The scroll is consumed during the upgrade process.
Traditional_Chinese: 此卷軸可防止升級失敗時飾品不見。要使用，請在升級之前將卷軸放在升級選單上的相對應框中。升級過程中會消耗卷軸。

Traditional_Chinese: 戰鬥時生命、魔力、活力會自動恢復，持續 15 分鐘。

English: Gives the character 1 cheer point and +10% Exp. for 10 Min.
Traditional_Chinese: 給予玩家 1 點鼓勵點數，並在 10 分鐘內經驗值 +10%。

English: Upgrade success rate x1.1 up to +7. To use, place scroll in the appropriate box on the Upgrade Menu before attempting the upgrade. The scroll is consumed in the process.
Traditional_Chinese: 升級成功率 x1.1 高達 +7。要使用，請在嘗試升級之前將卷軸放在升級選單上的相應框中。卷軸在這個過程中被消耗掉。

English: Teleport where you want in Madrigal and return later where the scroll was activated.
Traditional_Chinese: 在瑪德利賈村莊傳送你想要到的地方，然後在啟用卷軸的地方返回。

English: x2 HP Recovery per Second for 15 Min.
Traditional_Chinese: 15 分鐘內，生命的每秒恢復變成 2 倍。

English: x2 MP Recovery per Second for 15 Min.
Traditional_Chinese: 15 分鐘內，魔力的每秒恢復變成 2 倍。

English: x2 FP Recovery per Second for 15 Min.
Traditional_Chinese: 15 分鐘內，活力的每秒恢復變成 2 倍。

Traditional_Chinese: 增加經驗值 +5% 10 分鐘，傳說它也可作為一個好運護身符！

Traditional_Chinese: 經驗值加成 x1.5 倍，持續 1 小時。此效果不可疊加。

Traditional_Chinese: 經驗值加成 x2 倍，持續 1 小時。此效果不可疊加。

Traditional_Chinese: 掉落率加成 x2 倍，持續 1 小時。此效果不可疊加。

English: A strong and mysterious Great Sword
Traditional_Chinese: 沉眠於伊普里司啟示錄中的巨劍，揮落時宛如黑夜壓境。
纏繞古老詛咒的戰斧，刃鋒掠過之處只餘低鳴與灰燼。

English: A strong and mysterious Great Axe
Traditional_Chinese: 自黑暗祭壇取下的巨斧，據說能劈開鎧甲，也劈開持有者心中的畏懼。
烙有伊普里司紋樣的手套，握拳時彷彿聽見遠古守護者的怒吼。
記載於伊普里司啟示錄的法棒，杖身微光如殘星，引領施法者穿越幽暗。
以禁忌咒文喚醒的魔杖，尖端凝著幽光，像一枚不肯熄滅的夜星。
承載古老預言的法杖，杖影落地時，沉睡的魔力便自黑暗深處回響。
弦上纏著闇色氣息的長弓，放箭時彷彿將夜幕本身射向敵人。
沿著命運軌跡迴旋的溜刃，來去無聲，像伊普里司低語般回到掌心。

Traditional_Chinese: 收集好東西比靠那些精靈把一切都做出來快多了！

Traditional_Chinese: 他沒有手臂，怎麼能這麼快撿起戰利品……

Traditional_Chinese: 這隻乳酪貓會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。他也相當瘋狂。

Traditional_Chinese: 我遲到了！我遲到了！有個非常重要的約會！沒時間打招呼、說再見！我遲到了！這個慢吞吞的小傢伙會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。

Traditional_Chinese: 這隻小可愛會跟著他的媽咪並撿起掉落的物品。

Traditional_Chinese: 你再也不用花上好幾個小時尋找這個小傢伙了！這是你專屬的摩可摩奇！這個小傢伙會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。

English: This stylish Soul Dancer has some wicked moves! He also follows his owner around picking up dropped items.
Traditional_Chinese: 這位時髦的靈魂舞者舞技邪門！他也會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。

English: Chameleon follows his owner around picking up dropped items.
Traditional_Chinese: 變色龍會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。

English: It took some elbow grease to get this little sucker in the game, but we finally got it. Hope you enjoy him as much as we do. - Raizei and Polynikes
Traditional_Chinese: 我們費了不少力氣才把這個小傢伙放進遊戲，但總算完成了。希望你和我們一樣喜歡他。- Raizei 和 Polynikes

English: No little Pang freshens buffs longer than Big Red. So kill a little longer, grind a little longer, hold tight a little longer. Longer with Big Red.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒有哪隻小胖胖能比紅胖胖更持久地刷新增益效果。所以再多打久一點、再多練久一點、再多撐久一點。和紅胖胖一起，久一點。

English: A Golem created from the Bones of the damned, and held together by the Voodoo spells of Laveau. This Golem is bound to an eternity of servitude and will forever stand by your side and pick up the loot of your victims.
Traditional_Chinese: 一個由被詛咒者的骨頭創造的傀儡，由拉維烏的巫毒咒語維持。這個傀儡被束縛在永恆的奴役中，將永遠站在你身邊，撿起你受害者的戰利品。

English: Your Meat Salad won't spoil when this frosty little guy is in charge of your loot.
Traditional_Chinese: 當這個冷酷的小傢伙掌管你的戰利品時，你的肉沙拉不會變質。

Traditional_Chinese: 最能形容格林奇先生的三個詞就是：「臭、臭、臭！」他就像三層酸菜毒菇三明治……還淋上砒霜醬！

English: Then one foggy Christmas Eve, Santa came to say: "Rudolph with your nose so bright, won't you give me buffs tonight?".
Traditional_Chinese: 某個霧濛濛的聖誕夜，聖誕老人走過來說：「魯道夫，你的鼻子這麼亮，今晚能給我增益效果嗎？」

English: This picks up items around automatically.
Traditional_Chinese: 這會自動撿起周圍的道具。

Traditional_Chinese: 兔兔相信好運跟隨它的主人四處撿拾掉落的道具。

English: This soulless, robotic, demon pet will follow it's master around picking up dropped items.
Traditional_Chinese: 這沒有靈魂的機器人惡魔寵物會跟隨它的主人拾起掉落的道具。

English: Mister Grizz follows his master around and picks up dropped items.
Traditional_Chinese: 泰迪熊跟著它的主人四處走走，撿起掉落的道具。

Traditional_Chinese: 小薯仔跟隨它的主人四處走走並撿起掉落的道具。

Traditional_Chinese: 巴布希卡娃娃（或俄羅斯套娃）通常是一組精緻木偶，一個套在另一個裡面。可以說，它們滿滿都是自己！

Traditional_Chinese: 傲嬌貓咪跟隨它的主人並撿起掉落的道具。

Traditional_Chinese: 她既可愛又好奇，還想跟你一起冒險！你也許不喜歡帶著穆蘭小貓到處跑，但她保證會盡力不擋你的路！

Traditional_Chinese: 可愛又柔軟的刺果獸會跟隨主人並撿起掉落的物品。困難的部分也許是要從牠那裡把東西拿回來！

English: Helps to transform Eggs into D grade pets
Traditional_Chinese: 可以從蛋馬上成長為 D 級的召喚獸。

English: Return a pet to its previous Level with 99.99% Exp. Gives you a chance to get a higher pet bonus.(The possible pet level: C/B/A/S)
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚獸退回前一階段等級並保留 99.99% 經驗值，有機會獲得更高的階級 (可能出現的召喚獸階級：C/B/A/S)

English: Randomly changes the level of a pet's current and previous class without changing the class itself. (Only works with B, A, and S Class Pets).
Traditional_Chinese: 不更改召喚獸類別，更改召喚獸當前階段和前一階段所獲得的能力值隨機更改 (僅限 B/A/S 級召喚獸)。

English: Pet HP does not decrease for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 10 分鐘內召喚獸的生命不會減少

English: Pet HP does not decrease for 10 minute and growing speed become * 1.5
Traditional_Chinese: 10 分鐘內召喚獸的生命不會減少，同時成長速度增加 1.5 倍。

English: Add a random life amount (1-5) to your Pet. Does not revive pets.
Traditional_Chinese: 以隨機機率提升召喚獸生命 1 ~ 5，無法復活召喚獸。

English: Feeds your pet with food from your inventory automatically. (Disappears 6 hrs. after first activation. Even if not being used.)
Traditional_Chinese: 自動餵養你的召喚獸 (第一次使用後 6 小時後消失，即使沒有召喚獸)

English: This curious syringe contains a viscous liquid which, when injected into an Egg Pet, instantly hatches it into a random D Class pet.
Traditional_Chinese: 這支奇特的注射器裝著黏稠液體，注入寵物蛋後會立刻孵化成隨機 D 級寵物。

English: Makes the maximum amount of pet food with the materials available in your inventory.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用各個戰利品可製作最大飼料的數量來製作召喚獸飼料。

English: Increases the life of a raised pet by 1
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚獸生命 +1 的神秘卷軸

English: Does not reduce the energy of Raised pets for 6 hours when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 開啟後自動使用背包中的飼料維持召喚獸目前的生命，無提升生命之功效，如需提升生命請自行手動餵食飼料；下線後會停止減少有效時間，上線狀態則持續減少有效時間，總共使用時間為 6 小時。(一旦使用後，無法開啟或關閉)

English: Does not reduce the energy of Raised pets for 1 day when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用時 1 天內不會減少飼養寵物的能量。

English: Does not reduce the energy of Raised pets for 7 days when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用時 7 天內會不降低飼養寵物的能量。

English: Does not reduce the energy of Raised pets for 15 days when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用時 15 天內會不降低飼養寵物的能量。

English: Does not reduce the energy of Raised pets for 30 days when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用時 30 天內會不降低飼養寵物的能量。

English: Scroll of Change Raised Pet Name
A Special Scroll used to name your summoned pet. This scroll only works on raised pets.
Traditional_Chinese: 可為你的召喚獸命名，僅限被召喚出來的召喚獸。

English: Scroll of Pet Revival Piece (S Class)
Gather 5 pieces and the Pet Tamer will give you a Scroll of Pet Revival (S Class).
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚獸復活卷軸 (S) 的碎片，收集到 5 個後，拿給召喚獸訓練師的話，就可以換到召喚獸復活卷軸 (S)

English: Scroll of Pet Revival Piece (A Class)
Gather 5 pieces and the Pet Tamer will give you a Scroll of Pet Revival (A Class).
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚獸復活卷軸 (A) 的碎片，收集到 5 個後，拿給召喚獸訓練師的話，就可以換到召喚獸復活卷軸 (A)

English: Scroll of Pet Revival Piece (B Class)
Gather 5 pieces and the Pet Tamer will give you a Scroll of Pet Revival (B Class).
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚獸復活卷軸 (B) 的碎片，收集到 5 個後，拿給召喚獸訓練師的話，就可以換到召喚獸復活卷軸 (B)

English: Revives a dead S Class pet.
Traditional_Chinese: 讓死掉的 S 級召喚獸復活的卷軸

English: Revives a dead A Class pet.
Traditional_Chinese: 讓死掉的 A 級召喚獸復活的卷軸

English: Revives a dead B Class Pet.
Traditional_Chinese: 讓死掉的 B 級召喚獸復活的卷軸

English: Prevents a card from being destroyed when an upgrade fails.
Traditional_Chinese: 當鑲嵌卡片轉換失敗時可防止卡片被破壞

English: Permanently increases the amount of members you can have in a guild by 5. Only works on the current guild you are in.
Traditional_Chinese: 永久增加 5 名公會成員，僅適用當前所在公會。
劇團經驗值加成卷軸 (7 日)

English: Increase the rate at which Party Exp is gained by 50%, when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts 7 days from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，所有劇團成員狩獵時所獲得的劇團經驗值會提升 50%。(持續 7 天，即使登出也會持續計算)
劇團經驗值加成卷軸 (15 日)

English: Increase the rate at which Party Exp is gained by 50%, when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts 15 days from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，所有劇團成員狩獵時所獲得的劇團經驗值會提升 50%。(持續 15 天，即使登出也會持續計算)
劇團技能無限卷軸 (7 日)

English: Allows Party Skills to be stacked, combining their duration, but not effect. Works when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts 7 days from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，可讓劇團技能可重複使用，累加技能時間。(持續 7 天，即使登出也會持續計算)
劇團技能無限卷軸 (15 日)

Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，可讓劇團技能可重複使用，累加技能時間。(持續 15 天，即使登出也會持續計算)

Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，所有劇團成員狩獵所獲得的劇團經驗值會提升 50%。(持續 1 天，即使登出也會持續計算)

English: Allows Party Skills to be stacked, combining their duration, but not effect. Works when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts a day from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 團長使用時，可讓劇團技能可重複使用，累加技能時間。(持續 1 天，即使登出也會持續計算)

English: Your Party Level is set to Level 40 as soon as you use this scroll. Your Party Points will be set to 400 as well. Note that you will lose Party Points if they are higher than 400 prior to using this scroll.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用後立即提升劇團等級至 40 級，並發放 400 點劇團點數，若使用前已獲得 400 點劇團點數，將不會給予超過的點數。

English: Your party will get twice the number of points when reaching a new level. Lasts 7 days. Note that the counter on this item will continue to count down even when logged out.
Traditional_Chinese: 劇團升級所獲得點數兩倍，持續 7 天，即使登出也會持續計算。

English: Changes Guild Logo. Your Guild must be at least level 4.
Traditional_Chinese: 更改公會徽章，公會等級需達到 4 級

Traditional_Chinese: 重置你的數值的活動道具。僅適用於你當前的統計頁面。

Traditional_Chinese: 使用時 3 分內可以跳得比平時還要高。

English: Will summon a Giant Nautrepy, Syliaca, Greemong, or Boo nearby. To use, double click it, and select an area on the ground to summon the Giant.
Traditional_Chinese: 能夠召喚出愛美酷帥鼠、得肯湖傳說、好大一陀史萊膿、終極魔花獸其中之一的晶球。要使用，請點選它兩下，然後選擇地面上的一個區域來召喚更大隻的。

Traditional_Chinese: 珊瑚島的克拉肯斯那裡獲得的任務物品。不要沾到衣服上！

Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的克雷普處獲得的任務物品。裡面還剩下一點肉。

Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的那迦那裡獲得的任務物品，頭髮自然且乾燥。

Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的阿托克斯處獲得的任務物品。這些翅膀有點黏。

Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的虎人那裡獲得的任務物品。牙齒上沾滿了過去受害者的血。很諷刺，不是嗎？

Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的多利安那裡獲得的任務物品。牙齒看起來就像被拋光過一樣。

English:
This purchase gives you many advantages during the October Pass season:
-More Flyff Pass rewards
-Common Bank
-2 days Vendor Shops
-Unlimited Acceleration Fuel
-Unlimited Exp Lock
-Dungeons Map and Navigator
-Faster Safe Upgrades
-1 More Free Dungeon Entrance
-5 Daily Search Shop Teleports

在十月通行證季節購買此產品可為你帶來許多好處：

English: Increase the rate at which Party Exp is gained by 50% and enhances Party Skills, negating their distance limitations. Allows Party Skills to be stacked, combining their duration, but not effect. Your party will get twice the number of points when reaching a new level. Works when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts 1 day from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 將劇團經驗值的獲得率提高 50%，並增強劇團技能，消除距離限制。允許堆疊劇團技能，結合其持續時間，但不結合效果。當達到新的等級時，你的劇團將獲得兩倍的積分。當團長啟用時生效。(啟動後持續 1 天，即使登出也會持續計時)

Traditional_Chinese: 為自己施加一道屏障，抵擋下一次攻擊。

A stone that has been unsuccessfully carved, leaving only powder. Unfortunately, there seems to be no use for it.
Traditional_Chinese: 雕刻失敗後只剩下粉末的石頭。很遺憾，似乎派不上任何用場。

English: A finely ground powder of gemstones. It can be used for many purposes.
Traditional_Chinese: 將寶石細磨而成的粉末，可用於多種用途。

English: A stone that has had the impurities of limestone removed.
Traditional_Chinese: 去除了石灰岩雜質後得到的石材。

English: A gemstone that has had the impurities of quartz removed.
Traditional_Chinese: 去除了石英雜質後得到的寶石。

Traditional_Chinese: 將綠松石寶石拋磨後得到的寶石。

Traditional_Chinese: 有時可從銅礦中發現的寶石。

English: A gemstone obtained by grinding jade gemstones.
Traditional_Chinese: 將翡翠寶石打磨後得到的寶石。

English: A metal that can be obtained by polishing silver ore.
Traditional_Chinese: 將銀礦拋磨後可得到的金屬。

English: A metal that can be obtained by polishing gold ore.
Traditional_Chinese: 將金礦拋磨後可得到的金屬。

English: A metal obtained by polishing platinum ore.
Traditional_Chinese: 將白金礦拋磨後得到的金屬。

English: A gemstone obtained by polishing a diamond gemstone.
Traditional_Chinese: 將鑽石寶石拋光後得到的寶石。

English: A clear glass. It can be used for many purposes.

Traditional_Chinese: 透明玻璃瓶，是煉金實驗所需的必要材料。

Traditional_Chinese: 用來連接家具部件的鉸鏈。

Traditional_Chinese: 可用來照見自己倒影的鏡子。

Traditional_Chinese: 允許你重新隨機一個寵物階級的等級。一旦選擇重置某個階級，其他所有階級將無法再使用重置卷軸進行重置。

Traditional_Chinese: 從海尼爾遺都的輝鱗處獲得的任務物品。這塊流光魚鱗片似乎會發出熒光。

English: Quest Item: Magic water stone to help identify the area.
Traditional_Chinese: 任務物品：幫助識別區域的神奇水之石。

Traditional_Chinese: 任務物品：魔法水石頭的分析結果，這真的是海尼爾遺都嗎？

Traditional_Chinese: 從海尼爾遺都的恐鰭處獲得的任務物品。恐鰭肯定在戰鬥中失去了這顆牙齒。

Traditional_Chinese: 一件從海尼爾遺都的怖鱗身上獲得的任務物品。怖鱗們相信這枚勳章能提升它們的力量。
隨機房屋 NPC 箱 (7 天)

Traditional_Chinese: 內含一個隨機的 7 天房屋 NPC。該 NPC 將是綁定的。

Traditional_Chinese: 此卷軸可讓你的個人商店或販售商店以金色標記顯示在搜尋商店結果的最上方。開啟商店時會消耗，關閉商店後效果消失。

English: These wings, infused with dark energy, allow you to soar through Madrigal with the grace of a true lord of the abyss.
Traditional_Chinese: 這對注入黑暗能量的羽翼，讓你能以真正深淵之主的優雅姿態翱翔於瑪德利賈。

English: Twisted horns emerge from this cursed hair, embodying the raw power of the Veduque. A symbol of dominance over the shadows.
Traditional_Chinese: 這頂受詛咒的髮飾長出扭曲的犄角，象徵著維杜克最原始的力量，也是支配闇影的印記。

English: Select which Wilds Weapon you want to receive!
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇你想獲得的荒野武器造型！

English: A majestic cloak adorned with a fiery mane and tribal armor. Only the bravest warriors can wear this symbol of power.
Traditional_Chinese: 飾有烈焰鬃毛與部族甲飾的威嚴披風。唯有最勇猛的戰士才配披上這份力量的象徵。

English: Light as an autumn breeze, this leaf-shaped hat connects you to nature. Wear it and let the wind guide you.
Traditional_Chinese: 這頂葉片造型的帽子如秋風般輕盈，讓你與自然相連。戴上它，任由清風為你指引方向。

English: A fearsome war headdress adorned with bloodstained feathers and battle marks. Worn by the relentless Tangz Soldier, it embodies their untamed fury and unbreakable will on the battlefield.
Traditional_Chinese: 這頂駭人的戰盔飾有染血羽毛與斑駁戰痕。為冷酷無情的唐茲士兵所配戴，象徵著他們在戰場上不受馴服的怒火與永不屈服的意志。

English: A sacred headdress woven with animal fur and adorned with ritual markings. Worn by the shamans of the Wutangka, it channels the primal spirits of The Wilds, granting visions and mystical power.
Traditional_Chinese: 這頂神聖頭飾以獸毛編織而成，並飾有儀式紋樣。為巫坦卡的薩滿所佩戴，可引導荒野叢境的原始之靈，賦予預視與神秘力量。

English: A rugged yet cozy red scarf, once worn by daring adventurers braving The Wild. Its warm fabric and rustic charm make it a symbol of both resilience and style.
Traditional_Chinese: 這條粗獷卻舒適的紅圍巾，曾為勇闖荒野的冒險者所佩戴。它溫暖的布料與質樸魅力，使其成為堅韌與風格兼具的象徵。

English: A Pickaxe for an event to use in Ore mining. You can use it to harvest [Event] Easter Egg.
Traditional_Chinese: 活動用的礦石採掘十字鎬。可用來採集 [活動] 復活節彩蛋。

English: Event item you have mined. You can use it to obtain [Event] Easter Gift Box.
Traditional_Chinese: 你挖掘獲得的活動道具。可用來取得 [活動] 復活節禮盒。

English: Final Reward for the Easter Event!\nYou can earn Scroll of Production Boost x2, Scroll of Success x3, and Chroma Pickaxe x1
Traditional_Chinese: 復活節活動的最終獎勵！\n可獲得生產加速卷軸 x2、成功卷軸 x3，以及彩耀十字鎬 x1。

English: Third Reward for the Easter Event!\nYou can earn Scroll of Multi-Shop x20, Scroll of Resurrection x5, Activation x5, and Spring Buff Lucky Box x5
Traditional_Chinese: 復活節活動的第三階段獎勵！\n可獲得多重商店卷軸 x20、復活卷軸 x5、無限技能卷軸 x5，以及春季增益幸運箱 x5。

English: Second Reward for the Easter Event!\nYou can earn Scroll of Amplification ES x5, Flask Box x10, Upcut Stone x10, and Gold Pill x30
Traditional_Chinese: 復活節活動的第二階段獎勵！\n可獲得經驗值加成卷軸 ES x5、藥瓶箱 x10、力量之石 x10，以及金閃閃藥丸 x30。

English: First Reward for the Easter Event!\nYou can earn [Housing] Ordinary Tree Seed 1 Day x5, [Housing] Ordinary Ore Deposit 1 Day x5, [Housing] Ordinary Herb Seed 1 Day x5, Premium Repair Hammer x5, and Spring Buff Lucky Box x5
Traditional_Chinese: 復活節活動的第一階段獎勵！\n可獲得 [家園] 普通樹種子 1 天 x5、[家園] 普通礦脈 1 天 x5、[家園] 普通藥草種子 1 天 x5、高級修理鎚 x5，以及春季增益幸運箱 x5。

English: Daily reward box for Easter. You can obtain 1 item at random.
Traditional_Chinese: 復活節每日獎勵禮盒。可隨機獲得 1 項道具。

English: A pickaxe that can be used for mining even more ores. Mining success rate: 50%
Traditional_Chinese: 可用來採掘更多礦石的十字鎬。採礦成功率：50%

綠色 2025 電馭叛客自行車

藍色 2025 電馭叛客自行車

English: Glide through the city like a digital ghost! Sleek, swift, and undeniably futuristic! Maximum Speed: 64 km/h.
Traditional_Chinese: 像數位幽靈一樣滑過城市！時尚、敏捷、無可否認的未來感！最大速度：64 km/h。

Traditional_Chinese: 內含 1x 拾取強化卷軸 (15 天)、1x 迷人俄羅斯娃娃與 1x 拾取範圍卷軸 (15 天)。所有物品皆為綁定。

English: Increase the rate at which Party Exp is gained by 50% and enhances Party Skills, negating their distance limitations. Allows Party Skills to be stacked, combining their duration, but not effect. Your party will get twice the number of points when reaching a new level. Works when the party leader has it activated. (Lasts 3 days from activation, even if logged off)
Traditional_Chinese: 將劇團經驗值的獲得率提高 50% 並增強劇團技能，消除距離限制。允許堆疊劇團技能，結合其持續時間，但不結合效果。當達到新的等級時，你的劇團將獲得兩倍的積分。當團長啟用時生效。(自啟用起持續 3 天，即使登出也會計時)
